fields.name: head
fields.label: HTML head
fields.description: Contains your page’s SEO and browser metadata, including the title and description shown in search results and browser tabs.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: The page title shown in the browser tab and as the main headline in search engine results.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: A concise summary of the page’s content for search engines and link previews.

fields.name: aboutText
fields.label: About text
fields.description: A short paragraph introducing Danilyn and her work

fields.name: featuredBook
fields.label: Featured book
fields.description: This book is featured prominently on the home page

fields.name: featuredBookDescription
fields.label: Featured book description
fields.description: A paragraph or so description of the main featured book

fields.name: link
fields.label: Link to essay
fields.description: E.g., to the journal/publisher's page where the essay can be viewed

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description of essay
fields.description: A few sentences describing the essay

defaultItem.review: ...consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt.

fields.name: reviewer
fields.label: Reviewer
fields.description: The name of the person or entity giving the praise

fields.name: work
fields.label: Work
fields.description: The work being reviewed, e.g. "Beautiful Mystery"

fields.name: blueskyLink
fields.label: Bluesky profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://bsky.app/profile/danilynrutherford.bsky.social

fields.name: instagramLink
fields.label: Instagram profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://www.instagram.com/rutherforddanilyn/

fields.name: xLink
fields.label: X profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://x.com/@danilynfox

fields.name: facebookLink
fields.label: Facebook profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://www.facebook.com/danilyn.rutherford

fields.name: threadsLink
fields.label: Threads profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://www.threads.com/@danilyn.rutherford

fields.name: linkedinLink
fields.label: LinkedIn profile link
fields.description: e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/in/danilyn-rutherford-8b717722/

filename.description: The filename field is used internally by the content management system and is visible only to you, not to visitors.

fields.name: citationFormat
fields.label: Citation format
fields.description: This field determines the work's citation format (e.g. journal article, review, magazine article, etc.), and is not visible to public visitors.

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.description: This is the public-facing category shown to page visitors (e.g. Research Article, Commentary, etc.)

fields.name: containerTitle
fields.label: Journal/book/container/etc.
fields.description: Title of the journal, book, encyclopedia, newspaper, etc. in which this work was published

fields.name: href
fields.label: Link (if applicable)
fields.description: A link to the work on the publisher's page

filename.description: The filename field is used internally by the content management system and is visible only to you, not to visitors. I suggest a format like "beautiful-mystery", "living-in-the-stone-age", etc.
